memberdef.name: CHOICE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ const char *v = NEXT(); \ int idx = v ? lookup(v, tbl, (int)(sizeof(tbl) / sizeof(*tbl))) \ : -1; \ if (idx < 0) { \ fprintf(stderr, "error: bad value for %s\n", a); \ return 2; \ } \ dst = idx; \ } while (0)

memberdef.name: USAGE
memberdef.initializer:
= "usage: wfmgen [--from-file SPEC.json] [--type tone|noise|pn|bpsk|qpsk]
" " [--fs HZ] [--freq HZ] [--fc HZ] [--snr DB] [--snr_mode " "auto|fs|ebno|esno]
" " [--seed N] [--sps N] [--pn_length N] [--pn_poly N]
" " [--count N] [--off N] [--repeat] [--continuous]
" " [--sample_type cf32|cf64|ci32|ci16|ci8] [--file_type raw|csv|blue|sigmf]
" " [--endian le|be] [--output FILE|zmq://EP] [--record FILE]
"
